title: Add two-week view to calendar widget in dashboards
excerpt: My construction business uses the calendar widget in a dashboard that shows all our current jobs (boards). If we use the monthly view, we can only see one item, maybe two depending on the monitor. In the weekly view, we …

posts.author: gillylady (Gillian Eccles)
posts.cookedHtml: My construction business uses the calendar widget in a dashboard that shows all our current jobs (boards). If we use the monthly view, we can only see one item, maybe two depending on the monitor. In the weekly view, we can see everything, but we lose the longer view that we need to organize our subcontractors. It would be great to be able to add a 2-week view in the calendar widget.

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to also be able to see two months at a time as well. I use a dashboard to show our upcoming launch dates, but as we get later in the month, the board becomes less and less useful

posts.author: daniel.jarolim (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for sharing this — we have the exact same use case in our team. The monthly view is too condensed to be useful, while the weekly view lacks the broader planning horizon we need to coordinate resources effectively. A two-week calendar view would be the perfect balance and a huge help for our workflows.
Fully support this feature request!
Daniel

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Upvoted!

If you’re open to marketplace apps, we may be open to adding views like 2-week or 2-month views. Our app Calendar Plus already provides a year view, which may help with the 2-month overview. The basic features (including the year view) are free, so just install and reach out and we can chat about how to add/change a view. We’re quick with support.

–
